name: Election to Recognize Gain on Property Distributions

eligibility.description: Applies to non-cash distributions from estates or trusts; election applies to all distributions made during the taxable year.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Fiduciary can elect to recognize gain/loss on property distributions as if sold at FMV, which steps up the beneficiary's basis and may utilize trust-level losses.
